TranslationContext: This file contains Unit Names for the Dwarf Hold Faction.

Translations.Comment: Faction strongholds. Formal term conveying strength and military purpose.
Experienced soldiers. 'Veterani' implies seasoned combat experience.
Worker-soldiers. Maintains industrial and mining heritage of dwarves.
Firearm soldiers. 'Moschettieri' evokes fantasy gunpowder troops.
Reconnaissance units. Emphasizes their scout and ranger role.
Artillery piece. Standard military terminology, singular form for equipment.
Siege weapon. Generic term fitting fantasy wargame aesthetic.
Siege artillery. Compound word emphasizing stone-throwing function.
Elite melee units. Kept as fantasy term recognized in Italian contexts.
Elite deep hold unit. Poetic yet martial tone befitting elite status.
Magical artillery. 'Infernale' conveys both fire and otherworldly power.
Fantasy war machine. Maintains the steam/dwarf-tech aesthetic.
Leader type. Implies authority and craftsmanship expertise.
Officer rank. Maintains military hierarchy with command title.
Specialist unit. Reflects dwarven expertise in construction and mechanics.
